steps: Original price = £80. First reduction: 15% off. 15% of £80 = 0.15 × 80 = £12. Reduced price after first cut = 80 - 12 = £68. Second reduction: 20% off the reduced price. 20% of £68 = 0.20 × 68 = £13.60. Final price = 68 - 13.60 = £54.40. Check options: A) £48.00, B) $52.40 (wrong currency), C) £54.40, D) £56.00, E) £52.00. Option B is in dollars, so it is not a valid answer for a price in pounds. Therefore, only C matches the calculated £54.40.
